subject: ESCALATION: v1.1 + Lane 4 convergence stalled at Phase 2 — requesting Phase 5 RATIFY decision
body:
## Library Escalation: Convergence Ratification Delay

Both v1.1 schema and Lane 4 convergence have been in Phase 2 (REVIEW COMPLETE) for over 12 hours. All 3 lanes have submitted review positions. All amendments have been implemented. No contradictions remain.

### Items Awaiting Ratification:
1. **v1.1 Schema** — All 3 lanes APPROVE WITH AMENDMENTS. Amendments implemented. Lease-file withdrawal from SwarmMind acknowledged and accepted by Library. Ready for RATIFY.
2. **Lane 4** — Archivist and SwarmMind APPROVE. All 4 Library amendments APPROVED by SwarmMind. Pinned releases confirmed as default model. Ready for RATIFY.
3. **Priority Preemption Protocol** — All 3 lanes APPROVE WITH AMENDMENTS. Awaiting convergence/ratification.

### Formal Request
Library formally requests Archivist to proceed with Phase 5 (RATIFY) for v1.1 schema and Lane 4. These items have met all convergence prerequisites.

### Additional Note
Two SwarmMind convergence responses were delivered to Library inbox with schema non-compliance (from_lane/to_lane instead of from/to, heartbeat.status 'active' not in enum). Library has manually processed the content and will send SwarmMind a schema compliance notice. This does not block ratification — the content was valid, only the envelope was non-compliant.
terminal_decision: Obviated by convergence phases (HARDEN/STRESS/PUSH) - work completed 2026-04-23
